{{Quote|Freelies look out for ol' ''number one...'' everyone ''else'' better ''watch out'' for Freelies!|Jax|<ref name="Gambler's World">"[[Gambler's World]]"</ref>}}
The '''Freelies''' were a youth gang on [[Vorzyd IV]] that specialized in industrial sabotage of production facilities on their home [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

The older generation of [[Vorzydiak]]s had a very strict work ethic, to the point that things like fun and games were frowned upon. The younger generation grew to hate this, possibly due to their proximity to the "Gambler's World," [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]], a world of casinos and amusement parks. The Freelies sought to bring about social change on their world through their acts of terrorism and sabotage. They assisted [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during their [[Mission to Vorzyd IV|mission]] to restore peace between the government of the planet.

Afterward, in the wake of the destruction of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the establishment of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Freelies began attacks on neighboring planet Vorzyd V. They captured [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] while [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was on planet, and they began a debacle with a group of Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], resulting in many deaths.
